name: Presidio Jewelry Pawn
description_short: Presidio Jewelry Pawn buys and sells jewelry in San Diego with a 4.0-star rating. The owner provides fair pricing and transparent valuations on gold, diamonds, and collectible pieces.
description_long:
Presidio Jewelry Pawn operates as a jewelry buyer and seller located at 3555 Rosecrans St in San Diego's Midway District. Founded and run by an owner named Dan, the business has transitioned from traditional pawn lending to focus exclusively on buying and selling jewelry items. The shop evaluates used jewelry, diamonds, gold, and other collectibles, offering customers fair market prices for items they wish to sell.

The company provides jewelry appraisal and purchase services for customers looking to liquidate personal jewelry collections. They buy a variety of items including inherited pieces, vintage jewelry, and diamonds. According to customer reviews, the owner takes time to educate customers about their items and provides transparent pricing information. The business operates on a retail model rather than the traditional collateral-loan model typical of pawn shops.

What distinguishes Presidio Jewelry Pawn is the owner's hands-on approach and educational focus. Customers report that Dan and his team are friendly, knowledgeable, and willing to explain jewelry characteristics and valuations. The shop has earned 16 five-star reviews out of 20 total reviews on Yelp, with customers praising the fair treatment and professional demeanor. Unlike many pawn operations, this business explicitly does not offer pawn loans—it operates as a jewelry retail and buying service.

The primary caveat is that this is a jewelry-specific business rather than a full-service pawn shop offering collateral loans. Customers seeking quick cash through collateral-based lending should look elsewhere. The shop's limited hours (10 AM–5 PM weekdays, shorter weekend hours) may also present scheduling challenges for some consumers. Four one-star reviews exist on the platform, suggesting not all customer experiences have been positive, though one reviewer disputed the authenticity of negative reviews.
pros: 4.0-star Yelp rating with 16 five-star reviews out of 20 total reviews
Owner Dan is described as friendly, knowledgeable, and willing to educate customers about jewelry and valuations
Provides transparent pricing and fair valuations on gold, diamonds, and jewelry items
No longer operates as traditional pawn shop—eliminates high-interest loan obligations for customers
Located in accessible Midway District near Rosecrans St and Midway Dr intersection
Buys a wide range of jewelry types including inherited pieces, vintage items, and diamonds
Professional team approach with consistent customer service quality noted in recent reviews
cons: Does not offer collateral-based pawn loans—only buys and sells jewelry, limiting use cases for customers needing quick cash
Four one-star reviews indicate some negative customer experiences, though authenticity is disputed
Limited weekend hours (11 AM–4 PM Saturday, 12 PM–3 PM Sunday) may inconvenience some customers
No information provided about buy-back policies, return windows, or price-match guarantees
Limited online presence—website presidiojewelry.com exists but content details unavailable in source material
best_for: Customers with inherited or unused jewelry collections seeking fair-market liquidation
Individuals looking to sell diamonds, gold, or vintage jewelry pieces without pawning collateral
People seeking transparent jewelry appraisals and education about item values
Buyers looking for pre-owned jewelry and diamonds at retail locations
diagnosis: Presidio Jewelry Pawn is best suited for customers who own jewelry, diamonds, or gold they wish to sell for cash, and who value transparent pricing and knowledgeable service. The critical caveat is that this business does not offer traditional pawn loans—it only buys and sells jewelry—so customers needing quick collateral-based lending should seek a different pawn shop.
services: Customer education on jewelry characteristics and pricing
